content:
I'll search LinkedIn for people matching these ELK pain point profiles. Let me start by exploring the available tools and then run targeted searches.Now let me run searches for all 5 pain point categories in parallel:I got results for the first category but hit search limits and timeouts. Let me get detailed profiles for those matches and try alternative searches:Let me try the remaining searches with more targeted keywords:Now let me get detailed profiles for the best matches from each category:## LinkedIn ELK Pain Point Search Results

I found professionals across all 5 pain point categories. Here's the comprehensive report:

---

### **Category 1: Splunk + Elasticsearch + Migration Experience**

**Alec Bell**
- **Role:** Professional Services Cloud Migration Architect at Splunk
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/alec-bell-668526134/
- **Key Skills:** Splunk Cloud Migrations, AWS Solutions Architecture, Project Delivery, T-SQL
- **Why They Match:** 6+ years at Splunk as a Cloud Migration Architect. Specializes in migrating customers TO Splunk, making him aware of migration pain points from other platforms. Has Splunk Accredited Cloud Migration Consultant certification.

**Mohannad Elewaily**
- **Role:** Senior Observability / Elasticsearch Engineer at EJADA Egypt
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohannad-elewaily/
- **Key Skills:** Elasticsearch, ELK Stack, Elastic Cloud on Kubernetes (ECK), AWS, Kubernetes, GitLab
- **Why They Match:** Specializes in "platform migrations" between observability tools. Experience designing, migrating, and operating production logging platforms. Works at the intersection of Elasticsearch migrations and cloud operations.

---

### **Category 2: Data Loss / Data Integrity Experience**

**Praveen Padmanabhuni**
- **Role:** Senior Search Consultant - Python and Elasticsearch SME
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/praveen-pmnv/
- **Key Skills:** Elasticsearch, Python, AWS OpenSearch, Neural Search, Hybrid Search
- **Why They Match:** Works on "Fastenal product search platform" with Elasticsearch-AI driven solutions. Would be acutely aware of data quality issues affecting search relevance and accuracy.

**Itshak Hillel (Eli)**
- **Role:** Self Employed - DevOps & Cloud Architect - Kafka & Elasticsearch Expert
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/itshak-hillel-eli-7a359652/
- **Key Skills:** Elasticsearch, Kafka, Linux Application Development
- **Why They Match:** Consulting revolves around open-source solutions and Elasticsearch. Self-employed consultant likely sees many data integrity issues across client implementations.

---

### **Category 3: Logstash + Pipeline Debugging Experience**

**Snehal Bairagi**
- **Role:** Workplace & ELK Support Engineer at LTIMindtree (LTM)
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/snehal-bairagi-291718227/
- **Key Skills:** Elasticsearch 8.x→9.x, Logstash, Beats, Filebeat, Metricbeat, Kibana
- **Why They Match:** Actively posts about Logstash debugging issues including "Avoiding Duplicate Logs in Elasticsearch," JDBC pipeline configuration, cluster bootstrap errors. Has hands-on experience troubleshooting Logstash pipelines with grok filters and data parsing issues. Supports production ELK stack upgrades and pipeline optimizations.

**Rakesh Kumar Singh**
- **Role:** Observability Expert - Specialist in Splunk, Cribl, Grafana & OpenTelemetry
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/rakesh-kumar-singh-b2853363/
- **Key Skills:** Splunk, Cribl, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Fluentd
- **Why They Match:** Led integration of external data sources and third-party tools including Fluentd and OpenTelemetry for comprehensive data collection - heavily involved in pipeline debugging.

**Marripati Tarakeswar Reddy**
- **Role:** Seeking ELK Operational Support
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/marripati-tarakeswar-reddy-1481b8243/
- **Key Skills:** Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana, Ansible
- **Why They Match:** Explicitly seeking ELK operational support roles. Expertise in installing, upgrading, and configuring ELK through Ansible - knows the pain points firsthand.

---

### **Category 4: Kubernetes + Elastic / Fleet Server Experience**

**Fram Souza**
- **Role:** Site Reliability Engineer at Elastic (works AT Elastic)
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/francismarasouza/
- **Key Skills:** Kubernetes, Distributed Systems, Elastic Stack (ELK), Logstash, Helm, Terraform, AWS
- **Why They Match:** 5+ years at Elastic, currently Senior SRE. Specializes in "Kubernetes and automation to incident response, on-call excellence." Created AI agent for managing Elasticsearch Serverless projects. Deep expertise in running Elastic on Kubernetes at scale. Focused on ML infrastructure and GPU-powered semantic search.

**Jeff Tharp**
- **Role:** Principal Site Reliability Engineer at Elastic
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/jtharpla/
- **Key Skills:** Elasticsearch, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Ansible, Python, MongoDB
- **Why They Match:** 7 years at Elastic supporting Elastic Cloud operations across AWS, Azure, GCP in 60+ regions. Maintains Terraform codebase for multi-cloud infrastructure. Previously led implementation of "Elasticsearch-as-a-service" offering at ObjectRocket. 26 years of infrastructure experience, 9 years as SRE/DevOps.

---

### **Category 5: ELK + On-call / SRE Experience**

**Jogendra Ayatha**
- **Role:** Sr Site Reliability Engineer at MHK (Open to Opportunities)
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/jogendraayatha/
- **Key Skills:** ELK Stack, Prometheus, Grafana, Splunk, Dynatrace, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Azure, GCP
- **Why They Match:** 10+ years as SRE/DevOps. Explicitly lists "ELK Stack" in his title. Experience with "enterprise-grade monitoring and observability using ELK Stack, Prometheus, Grafana" and "automated alerts and incident management." Active job seeker - currently available. Worked at Walgreens, Humana, Bank of America - all high-stakes on-call environments.

**Ajayan A**
- **Role:** Senior Site Reliability Engineer at IBM
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/ajayan-a-85836173/
- **Key Skills:** Kubernetes, Prometheus, ELK Stack, Loki - "99.99% Uptime Advocate & Toil Reduction Specialist"
- **Why They Match:** Explicitly mentions ELK Stack in title with focus on uptime/on-call reliability. Specializes in reducing toil through better tooling.

**Sanket Tembhare**
- **Role:** Lead Site Reliability Engineer at Major Canadian Banking Clients
- **Profile:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanket-tembhare/
- **Key Skills:** Splunk, ELK, Kubernetes, Python, Java, AWS, GCP, Dynatrace
- **Why They Match:** Lead SRE at banking clients (high-stakes on-call environment). Combines ELK with Splunk experience - understands migration pain points between platforms.

---

## **Summary**

**Total Profiles Found:** 13 high-quality matches across 5 categories

**Best Prospects for ELK Pain Point Outreach:**
1. **Jogendra Ayatha** - Currently seeking opportunities, 10+ years SRE, explicitly lists ELK in title
2. **Snehal Bairagi** - Very active posting about Logstash debugging challenges publicly
3. **Mohannad Elewaily** - Specializes in migrations and observability platform design
4. **Fram Souza & Jeff Tharp** - Work AT Elastic (SREs) - understand customer pain points intimately
5. **Alec Bell** - Splunk migration specialist - understands migration pain points from competitor perspective
